text:
In the first image, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with detachment. I observe a conference room behind glass where people are engaged in learning, their attention fixed on a screen. I am outside looking in, separated not just by the barrier of glass, but also by the boundaries of participation—witness to an unfolding discussion without a voice of my own. 

In the second image, the vivid colors and modern design ignite a feeling of inspiration. I stand in a space dedicated to R+D, where research meets creativity, and I am reminded of the relentless human drive to innovate and connect. I feel a quiet excitement at the sight of artifacts and displays meant to provoke thought on the relationship between humans and technology. Here, I feel closer to the pulse of progress and imagination.
